title: WIHP Sondro-oso Taki Masyin
subtitle: Skrifi ibri wortu → Kisi IPA na Wiktionary → Kenki na Hangul!

philosophy: Wortu no musu abi marki. WIHP e gi Wiktionary IPA tangi.
